title: Apache Hop
description: Open-source data orchestration and integration platform (ETL) for designing and running visual data pipelines and workflows in the browser.
installation: Deploys the official apache/hop-web image, with the visual designer reachable at the /ui path on the app URL. Apache Hop stores its projects, environments, and metadata as files, so no database add-on is provisioned; the persistent /config volume holds your project and config directory and must be kept. Mount or import your Hop project under /config and set HOP_PROJECT_FOLDER / HOP_PROJECT_NAME / HOP_ENVIRONMENT_NAME to auto-load it on startup (leave them empty to start with the default 'samples' project). Database, file, and message-queue connections used by your pipelines (Postgres, MySQL, Kafka, S3, etc.) are configured inside Hop per pipeline and are not part of this template. For production, run with a sized app pod (the JVM needs more than the default 512Mi) and add authentication in front of Hop Web, which ships without built-in login.
